arts.ttl: Alexander Isak sends Arsenal clear transfer message as Newcastle star realises true 'dream'
arts.sum: Despite speculation over his future, Isak has claimed it's 'extra special' to play for a club like Newcastle. Playing in the Premier League for a club like Newcastle with a fan base like they have here is extra special."

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Alexander Isak speaks out as Matheus Cunha makes final decision
arts.sum: Arsenal want to sign a striker in the January transfer window, but Newcastle star Alexander Isak and Wolves' Matheus Cunha now appear to be out of reach this month

arts.ttl: How Liverpool's next five Premier League fixtures compare to Arsenal's
arts.sum: Comparing the upcoming Premier League fixture lists of title hopefuls Liverpool and Arsenal after the Reds drew with Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Arsenal & Man Utd target set to snub transfer interest
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers forward Matheus Cunha is reportedly on the verge of agreeing a new contract with the relegation strugglers.

arts.ttl: Tottenham transfer news: Spurs 'discussing' £79.2m striker transfer amid Arsenal competition
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur reportedly discuss a deal for Paris Saint-Germain striker Randal Kolo Muani, who has also been linked with North London rivals Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal make first approach for attacker with impressive 43 goals & 20 assists
arts.sum: Arsenal have seen an opening bid rejected for Botafogo star Igor Jesus, according to Brazilian outlet RTI Esporte. The Gunners are said to be in the market for a stop-gap solution to their attack amid an injury crisis, with key forward Bukayo Saka sidelined for several weeks due to a hamstring injury sustained against Crystal […] The post Report: Arsenal make first approach for attacker with impressive 43 goals & 20 assists appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal see surprise bid REJECTED as Arteta seeks first January transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal have seen a January bid for Botafogo striker Igor Jesus rejected, according to reports in Brazil, as Mikel Arteta eyes mid-season reinforcements. That is according to Brazilian outlet RTI Esporte, who report that Botafogo swiftly rejected Arsenal’s offer as they have no intention of allowing Jesus to leave the club on loan this month.
